snippet.title: Supercharge your rail game with pro surfer Isaac Stant
snippet.description:
2-4X your wavecount with the Basis Paddle Trainer and accelerate your progression and fun. Shipping globally. https://surfbasis.com/

Get free resources to upgrade your paddle power https://linktr.ee/gosurfbasis

Join hundreds of other surfers who have dramatically boosted their wave count and progression. 

For many surfers, paddle power is their biggest limiting constraint, so paddle training is the highest returning investment you can make in your surfing.

In this episode we have @Isaacstant, a competitive pro surfer based in Maui who competes on the challenger series and was part of the crew that started paddling Jaws. Isaac shares his insights about how riding a step-up can improve your surfing, how surfing small waves is how you level up, improving your power surfing, breaking through plateaus, the nuances of weight distribution and generating speed, and the importance of paddling.  We will dive deep into Isaac’s approach to technique and all that he has in his head.

Subscribe for more interviews with pro surfers, coaches, shapers, and everyday surfers like Matt Meola, Noel Salas of Surf n Show, Kassia Meador, Ryan Lovelace, Dylan Lightfoot, Derek Dunfee, Magnum Martinez, Isaac Stant, Nakoa Decoite, and more!

snippet.title: Community and Clubs at 42 Berlin Coding School
snippet.description:
Are you a software engineer (or interested in becoming one) and are looking for a like-minded community who can lift you up and support you in your journey? 

Coding, community & 42 Berlin go hand in hand due to ur holistic approach to in the curriculum and life on campus more generally.

In this SO2EO3, we're diving into the supportive ecosystem that thrives on our campus, nourished by principles from our peer-to-peer methodology and the values we ask our students and staff to follow. In your studies at 42 Berlin, the people around you are the ticket to your success, but it doesn't stop there. Every single person contributes to the quality of life on campus, in whichever way they feel moved to. Take a look at how we are all fundamental in making sure our Learning SpaceShip is flying in the right direction. 

To join 42 Berlin, go to our website and click Apply Now to start your application journey: https://42berlin.de/

Many thanks and credits to Alexander Mundt for videography and editing & to Magdalena Skorupska & Mia Jaccarini for production, Jonas, Flo & Luis for their insightful interviews.
 
Remember to like and share this video and subscribe to our channel for more content like this. 

Follow us on IG for regular updates: https://www.instagram.com/42berlin_/ 

Would you like to join one of our upcoming events? Find them all here: https://www.eventbrite.de/o/42-berlin-60108695013 

#NextGenerationTechEducation

snippet.title: 474 WGW - Preaching by bearing witness in the Gaza Strip
snippet.description:
The Gaza Strip: 41km long and 10km wide, it is bordered by the Mediterranean Sea, Israel and Egypt. It is ruled today by the militant Islamist group Hamas. When Hamas took over in Gaza, both Israel and Egypt imposed a blockade on the territory. It is home to 1.9 million people. Some say the Gaza Strip is the largest prison in the world. Sr. Bridget Tighe is a member of the Franciscan Missionaries of the Divine Motherhood (FMDM), and General Director of Caritas Jerusalem. Jonas Soto is the interviewer of Sister Bridget.
-----------
Duration: 26' 26"
Date of Production: 2018
--------------
This program of the series “Where God Weeps” was financed by the Catholic charity Aid to the Church in Need. More information can be found here:
https://www.acninternational.org/

snippet.title: Michel Onfray & Michaël Azoulay - Dieu ? : le philosophe & le rabbin
snippet.description:
Quand la foi et la raison dialoguent sans chercher à se convertir, mais à comprendre les fondements de la croyance et de l'éthique.

Michel Onfray & Michaël Azoulay vous présentent son ouvrage "Dieu ? : le philosophe & le rabbin" aux éditions Bouquins. Entretien avec Pierre Coutelle.

Retrouvez le livre : https://www.mollat.com/livres/2664180/michel-onfray-dieu-le-philosophe-et-le-rabbin

Loin de l'invective, les deux intervenants explorent la possibilité même du débat autour de Dieu. La discussion s'ouvre sur la nature de la foi : est-elle une grâce reçue, caractéristique du catholicisme, ou un héritage historique et identitaire, propre au judaïsme ? Michaël Azoulay souligne l'importance de l'étude textuelle et de la maïeutique dans la tradition juive, où le questionnement prime souvent sur le dogme.

Les échanges mettent en lumière la singularité de l'identité juive, définie comme un état ("être juif") plutôt que comme une simple adhésion à un crédo, et analysent l'absence de prosélytisme comparée aux visées universelles du christianisme ou de l'islam. Un consensus inattendu émerge dans leur critique commune de l'agnosticisme, qualifié de position intenable ou de paresse intellectuelle face à la nécessité de trancher. Le débat aborde ensuite la douloureuse question du mal et de la souffrance, notamment à travers le Livre de Job, avant de conclure sur la recherche d'une morale universelle, qu'elle soit d'origine divine ou fondée sur la raison humaine.

0:10 Possibilité du débat sur Dieu
1:57  La foi : héritage culturel ou révélation ?
5:54  L'identité juive face à la grâce catholique
8:54 L'importance de l'étude et de la controverse dans le Talmud
11:00  Être juif : une question d'être ou de croyance ?
14:15  Le concept du "rabbin athée" et le rapport au texte
17:27  Prosélytisme et vision des autres religions
21:54  Universalisme et particularisme : les lois de Noé
24:00  La conversion et les tensions identitaires
26:40  Critique commune de l'agnosticisme et du doute
32:54  L'épreuve du mal : réflexion sur le Livre de Job
40:39  Morale religieuse et éthique universelle

snippet.title: KIM KARDASHIAN OPENS UP About Insecurity, Healing Your Pain, & Finding HAPPINESS | Jay Shetty
snippet.description:
If you enjoy this episode, you'll also love my episode with Kendall Jenner! 👉 https://youtu.be/ZjIRYn7x8sk

Kim Kardashian is an entrepreneur, business mogul, and producer. She first gained media attention in her appearances in the reality television series "Keeping Up with the Kardashians," which chronicles the personal and professional lives of her and her family members. Over the years, Kim Kardashian has built a successful brand, including beauty and fashion lines, and has become known for her influential social media presence.

You can order my new book 8 RULES OF LOVE at 8rulesoflove.com or at a retail store near you. You can also get the chance to see me live on my first ever world tour. This is a 90 minute interactive show where I will take you on a journey of finding, keeping and even letting go of love. Head to jayshettytour.com and find out if I'll be in a city near you. Thank you so much for all your support - I hope to see you soon.

What We Discuss:
00:00 Intro
03:55 When was the last time someone didn’t recognize you?
05:02 How often do you take a mental health check and have some time alone?
07:22 How do you manage a life in public with different personas?
09:38 Going out of your way to be of help and support someone in need
12:50 This is what genuine compassion can do for your personally and for others
16:25 Self work can be different for different people and that’s okay
18:02 Putting your own happiness first is a skill that can take time to learn
24:31 Surrounding yourself with people you trust is the best place to be in
29:05 With parenting, everyone says the days are long, the years are short
32:05 Parenting challenges is a lifetime commitment for every parent
36:32 Kids can ask difficult questions and this is how you can be more open to them
38:56 The journey of personal growth through helping other people
40:54 Kim explains that we all make mistakes and the second chance we get makes a huge  difference
44:12 “I’ve never been hard on myself, but I am competitive with myself.”
47:03 How can positive peer pressure help you?
52:08 The warm welcoming presence always makes people comfortable and welcome
54:41 When you feel like you’re the worst mom, how do you cope?
01:00:10 Living a good life and being the best example for your kids
01:01:34 Kim on Final Five

snippet.title: Don't just fall in love... grow in love! | Upasana Kamineni #shorts #ramcharan #love #upasana
snippet.description:
Our conversation with Upasana Kamineni Konidela, a humanitarian, an entrepreneur, a beautiful partner, and an expecting mom, gave us an insight into her empathetic and fighting spirit. Carrying ahead the legacy of her grandfather, Dr. Prathap C Reddy, the visionary Founder Chairman of Apollo Hospitals, she is the founder of URLife and MD-Family Health Plan Insurance. She was raised to treat people with love, respect, and dignity — her grandfather taught her the true meaning of philanthropy and that in serving the human kind lies real joy.

As in her own words, “I was on the sets of ‘Naatu-Naatu’ in Ukraine while they were filming the entire routine. I had to be there for Ram because he was literally shaking and I was there to support him emotionally. He has always been there for me in my most tough times at work and also stood hand-in-hand in my successes. We met through common friends and got married in our late 20s. Ram has taught me to rise in love, and has always been my guide and a calming factor. The Oscars in LA with him were my most memorable moments and literally felt like a vacation with our RRR family.”

“I want to be known for my worth, not because of my birth.

She married renowned Telugu Actor Ram Charan in 2012, and was recently seen supporting and vouching for her husband and team RRR’s Oscar winning song — Natu Natu!

Leading the conversation on a healthy and positive corporate world, she is an advocate for mental health. Upasana, for her positivity, is paving her own unique path and identity. 

We talked about-
- Getting ready for motherhood and travelling the world with Ram Charan.
- On being born with privilege and proving your worth.
- Living with gratitude and practicing empathy driven decision making.
- Learnings from her Grandfather and working with dignity for Apollo Hospitals Family.
- Meeting Ram Charan and getting married in her late 20s.
- Leading with service, respect and dignity for human kind.
- Unique response to her trollers and naysayers.
- Building healthy corporate environment as an Employer
- Feeling empowered and seeking financial Independence as a woman
- Special message recorded for her upcoming baby!

#upasana #ramcharan #humansofbombay

Humans of Bombay is a movement that started 8 years ago. We believe that every person has a story to tell and we want to help them tell these stories. snippet.title: Joe Jonas séparé de Sophie Turner : les raisons de leur rupture  #gossip #people #séparation
snippet.description:
Joe Jonas et Sophie Turner ont décidé de divorcer. Leurs modes de vie auraient fini par avoir raison de leur couple. 
Aperçu sans sa bague de fiançailles le 3 septembre dernier, Joe Jonas n’avait pas souhaité s’exprimer. Mais c’est Sophie Turner qui a décidé de briser le silence. 
« Déclaration de nous deux : Après quatre années de mariage merveilleuses, nous avons décidé conjointement de mettre fin à notre mariage, à l’amiable », écrit-elle sur Instagram. L’actrice tient à préciser que ce divorce est une décision commune.
Mais selon une autre source, cette décision aurait été davantage prise par le chanteur. « Joe a vu et entendu quelque chose et ça aurait été la goutte d'eau qui a fait déborder le vase. […] Ça lui fait prendre conscience que son mariage avec Sophie était terminé », déclare la source.

snippet.title: On se pose trop de questions avec Abdel | Office Torah (Shabbat)
snippet.description:
On se pose trop de questions

Se poser trop de questions peut avoir des effets négatifs sur notre bien-être et notre prise de décision. Tout d'abord, cela peut entraîner une paralysie de l'analyse, où nous sommes submergés par les multiples possibilités et les doutes incessants, ce qui rend difficile de prendre des décisions claires et rapides. En outre, cela peut nourrir l'anxiété et le stress, car le questionnement excessif peut créer un état constant de préoccupation et d'incertitude. 

On se pose trop de questions.

Cette vidéo est un extrait de l'enseignement d'Abdel de MDP pendant un shabbat.

Lien de l'enseignement : https://www.youtube.com/live/igJDL91Zehc?feature=share&t=6808

snippet.title: Bitcoin Under Attack In UK Court | Jess Jonas | Full Interview
snippet.description:
Jess Jonas is the chief legal officer at the Bitcoin Legal Defense Fund. She is also the point person organizing the defense of 13 bitcoin developers across two court cases in the United Kingdom. In this conversation, she breaks down what is going on in those court cases, why this is so important for bitcoin development & open source software, and then she describes how you can get involved to support their work. snippet.title: The four-day work week: luxury or necessity? | Re:Thinking with Adam Grant
snippet.description:
The TED Audio Collective is a collection of podcasts for the curious.

Why do we work five days a week? Could we be just as productive, healthier and happier by working less? And if so, how can leaders and workers successfully make the transition to a new way of working? Adam led a lively discussion of the science and practice of shorter work weeks with top experts from government, business, and academia at the World Economic Forum in Davos. The guests were Ohood Al Roumi, the UAE’s Minister of State for Government Development and the Future; Jonas Prising, CEO and Chairman of ManpowerGroup Inc.; Hilary Cottam, Social Entrepreneur at the Centre for the Fifth Social Revolution; and Anne-Marie Slaughter, CEO of New America. This episode also aired on Agenda Dialogues, a podcast from the World Economic Forum. You can listen to Agenda Dialogues and other podcasts from the WEF wherever you’re listening to this. For the full text transcript, visit go.ted.com/RWAG11

snippet.title: Tour d'Espagne 2023 - Sepp Kuss : "Roglic and Vingegaard ? We just have to be honest with ourselves"
snippet.description: Qui aurait parié avant ce 78e Tour d'Espagne sur un Sepp Kuss en Rouge lors de la dernière journée de repos ? Propulsé sur le devant de la scène depuis sa belle victoire en échappée à Javalambre (6e étape) et sa prise de pouvoir deux jours plus tard, l'Américain de la Jumbo-Visma a délaissé son costume de lieutenant de luxe pour se muer en véritable leader au cours d'une deuxième semaine pourtant riche en action, notamment dans les Pyrénées. A 28 ans, l'atypique grimpeur surnommé "l'Aigle de Durango" est à une semaine de rallier Madrid en Rouge et de remporter son tout premier Grand Tour, à moins que ses coéquipiers et habituels leaders Primoz Roglic et Jonas Vingegaard - respectivement 2e et 3e à 1'37" et 1'44" - ne finissent par sonner la fin du rêve. "Ce sera peut-être la plus belle et importante semaine de ma carrière", a-t-il confié dans une interview réalisée par Sporza ce lundi.

snippet.title: Entrepreneurship In The Digital Era - Keynote Speech by Dr Sara Al Madani | Manila 2023
snippet.description:
Dr. Sara Al Madani, the Emirati Entrepreneur, delivered an inspiring keynote speech at the AIBC Summit, where she delved into the transformative world of digital entrepreneurship. Her speech was a captivating journey through her personal experiences and insights, covering a range of crucial topics.

She initiated her talk by sharing the origins of her digital business, revealing the individuals and factors that ignited her entrepreneurial journey. Highlighting the advantages of being a digital entrepreneur, she underscored the freedom and flexibility this path offers. 

Addressing a common misconception, Dr. Sara Al Madani discussed the notion that digital entrepreneurship is inherently easy. She clarified that while the digital realm provides opportunities, success requires dedication and continuous learning.

Underscoring the significance of taking risks, she stressed that embracing uncertainty is an integral part of entrepreneurial success. Risk-taking fuels innovation and leads to groundbreaking accomplishments.

Transitioning into the realm of digital business, Dr. Sara Al Madani outlined its advantages, prominently highlighting its scalability. She underscored the paramount value of data in digital entrepreneurship, highlighting it as the modern-day goldmine that drives strategic decision-making.

She urged individuals to grant themselves permission to fail and to embrace failure as a learning experience. She also emphasized that setbacks are valuable lessons that contribute to ultimate success.

Defining the essence of a remarkable leader, she elaborated that great leaders exhibit empathy, communication prowess, and a knack for nurturing talent within their teams.

In a dynamic conclusion, she fielded questions from the crowd, providing insightful responses that resonated with attendees' queries and curiosities.

🔺 What is AIBC - The Emerging Tech Summit? 🔺 
AIBC is the conference pillar in technological development. We are a meeting point, uniting tech-leaders, regulators, investors and entrepreneurs from across the world. The Emerging Tech Summit brings all together to discuss, share ideas, make partnerships and build the foundation for the Industry Of Tomorrow.

snippet.title: MÉMOIRE PROFESSEUR EVARISTE MABI MULUMBA
snippet.description:
Boursier de l’AGCD, la coopération belge, l’ancien étudiant devenu professeur d’université a gravi presque tous les échelons du temps du MPR, jusqu’à la Primature, premier commissaire d’état du maréchal Mobutu, un an durant, il aura été.

L’histoire démarre de son enfance, dans les Kasaï, et se poursuit encore aujourd’hui.

En grand Economiste qu’il est, après la cour des comptes, par ses conseils éclairés aux politiques qui le consultent régulièrement. 

Evariste Mabi Mulumba nous raconte sa version de l’histoire, de son ascension academique, de son ascension politique dans un pays en rétrocession économique. 

Les professeurs d’université, tels que lui, auront ils ou non bien joué leur partition 

Le professeur est notre invité de ce soir.

Retour sur plus de 50 ans de carrière publique avec Christian Lusakueno

Les professeurs d’université, tels que lui, auront ils ou non bien joué leur partition 

Le professeur est notre invité de ce soir.

Retour sur plus de 50 ans de carrière publique avec Christian Lusakueno

snippet.title: Cipolla’s 5 Laws of Human Stupidity Explained
snippet.description:
Carlo Cipolla's law of stupidity states that "always and inevitably everyone underestimates the number of stupid individuals in circulation." Even though Cipolla originally wrote about the principle and its consequences for society in the form of an amusing letter to his friends, it gained wide attention. Today Cipolla's law is often used to highlight the importance of critical thinking and careful decision making in order to counteract the potential effects of endemic ignorance.

snippet.title: Philipp Burger - Weckt die Punks, weckt die Skins (Offizielles Video)
snippet.description:
„Weckt die Punks, weckt die Skins“ ist die erste Singleauskopplung aus Philipp Burgers zweitem Soloalbum „Grenzland“ das am 04.08.2023 erscheint. Der Name wurde bewusst mit reizenden Worten bestückt. Gehüllt in treibendem Ska und mit „four on the floor“-Beat im Refrain begleitet, geht Philipp gewohnt melodisch der Frage auf den Grund, wie die einst tiefe Liebe der Jugend zu den früher großen Jugendsubkulturen, so in den Hintergrund geraten konnte. Und heute weniger der unterschiedliche Individualismus jedes einzelnen, sondern vielmehr die Gegenwind-lose Gleichstellung aller, hip zu sein, scheint.

Hier findet ihr die Single ab 14.04.23 zum streamen/downloaden:
https://save-it.cc/rak/weckt-die-punks-weckt-die-skins

Tickets zur Record-Release Tour im August findet ihr in Kürze hier:

Der Album Vorverkauf startet am 05.06.23

Passendes Outfit JETZT im Shop:
https://shop.philippburger-official.com/

Abonniere hier meinen Kanal:  http://bit.ly/PhilippBurgerAbo

Songtext:
Sie war nicht schlechter
Meine Generation
Es gab einen Arsch voll Subkulturen
Mit eigener Mode, eigenen Liedern mein Sohn
Hier wusste jeder, wofür ein jeder steht
Ein Netz aus gleichgesinnten Banden
Spannte sich über den Planet

Heute weiß ich, das alles hat süchtig gemacht
Diese Einheit fern der Mehrheit
Ob bei Tag oder bei Nacht
Auf der Flucht vor Akzeptanz
Auf der Flucht vor der Vernunft
Weckt sie, schenkt ihnen neues Leben
Ich will Jugendvielfalt
Ich will viele, viele Szenen
Ich will Subkulturen sehen

Weckt die Punks, weckt die Skins
Weckt die Hippies, weckt die Gothics
Weckt die Hooligans
Weckt sie alle auf, seid anders und lebt
Denn alles gleich ist immer Scheiße
Zeigt mir, wofür und wogegen euer Herz schlägt
Auf eine Subkultur-Rebellion

Die Zeit vergeht, nichts wird ewig sein
Die Welt sie dreht sich immer weiter
Doch manche Dinge sollten bleiben
Wo ist die Jugendrebellion hin?
Wofür, wogegen steht sie ein?
Nur Edelfetzen und Angepasstheit
Können doch echt nicht alles sein

Welche Lieder, und welcher Geist?
Welche Helden sind an Bord?
Vielleicht bin ich schon zu alt?
Doch ich führe meinen Spirit fort
Zeige mir mit wem du dich umgibst
Und ich sage dir wer du bist
Trägst du mit Liebe und Stolz Geweih
Bist du bei der Frei.Wild-Wave dabei
Bist auf der Straße vogelfrei
Dann bist du Teil dieser Familie

Weckt die Punks, weckt die Skins
Weckt die Rockabillies, die Deutschrocker
Weckt die Hooligans
Weckt sie alle auf, seid anders und lebt
Denn alles gleich ist immer Scheiße
Zeigt mir, wofür und wogegen euer Herz schlägt
Auf eine Subkultur-Rebellion
Scheißegal wie sie heißt, suche dir was aus mein Sohn

Weckt die Punks, weckt die Skins
Weckt die Metalheads, die Skater
Weckt die Hooligans
Weckt sie alle auf, seid anders und lebt
Denn alles gleich ist immer Scheiße
Zeigt mir, wofür und wogegen euer Herz schlägt
Auf eine Subkultur-Rebellion
Scheißegal wie sie heißt, suche dir was aus mein Sohn
_________________________________________

snippet.title: Infosys' Mohit Joshi joins Tech Mahindra as MD and CEO
snippet.description:
Mohit Joshi, who resigned from Infosys on March 11, 2023, will join Tech Mahindra as the next CEO and Managing Director, replacing C. P. Gurnani. 
In a stock exchange filing, Tech Mahindra said Joshi would join as managing director and CEO with effect from December 20. C. P. Gurnani's, the present MD and CEO, term will end on December 19.
Joshi, who heads Infosys's Financial Services and Healthcare/Life Sciences businesses, resigned from his post on March 11. In a regulatory filing with the stock exchanges, Infosys said that Joshi would be there till June 9, 2023.
Joshi, who has spent almost 22 years at Infosys, has over two decades of experience in the enterprise technology software and consulting space. At Infosys, Joshi headed the global financial services, healthcare, and software businesses.

snippet.title: Verprügelt mit Punchlines #296 | Nackt vorm Krokodil | #Comedy #Podcast
snippet.description:
Willkommen zur neuesten Podcast-Folge mit unseren Comedy-Königen Falk, Ivan und Jonas! Diesmal stürzen sie sich in ein episches Gespräch über die skurrilsten Themen. Zunächst geht es um "Julienco" und seinen hochintelligenten Boxautomaten, der nicht nur boxt, sondern auch Liebeskummer lindert und Steuern erledigt - ein wahrer Alleskönner! Doch dann wird es wirklich verrückt: Falk enthüllt seine schockierende Erfahrung, als er auf einer Hochzeit plötzlich einem Krokodil den Brautstrauß fangen musste. Ivan hat hingegen eine Begegnung der dritten Art mit einer Oma, die nicht nur mit ihrem Rollator Rennen fahren kann, sondern auch eine beeindruckende Sammlung an Heavy-Metal-CDs besitzt. Aber das absolute Highlight kommt zum Schluss: Unsere Comedy-Helden diskutieren die wahre Bedeutung von "Hilfsbereitschaft" und wie man sie am besten vermeidet. Ein Podcast, der dich mit irrwitzigen Geschichten und einer Prise Ironie zum Lachen bringt - genieße die absurde Fahrt!

snippet.title: Sepp Kuss Takes the Lead at the Vuelta a España 2023 | THEMOVE+
snippet.description:
Spencer and Johan take a moment to discuss the significance of Jumbo-Visma's Sepp Kuss taking the overall lead at the Vuelta a España on Saturday’s stage 8 to become the first American rider in a decade to lead one of cycling’s three grand tours. They also break down how Kuss sitting so high in the GC helps, and hurts, Jumbo's big-picture plans at this Vuelta, as well as going through his chances of holding onto his substantial lead through the remainder of the race and if he has a realistic shot of winning the overall.
